Ethan Lee
Projects Blog About
Loop: Musical Social Media

A music streaming app powered by social media features. Designed an accessible and socially engaging listening platform to freely post music, moods, and tweets on top of its streaming service. Loop targets users who look for a consistent platform to share and discuss music with others.

FigmaUX ResearchUser Journey MapPrototypingWireframe
My Portfolio Website

A static website showcasing projects, experiences, and my interests. Ensured seamless navigation and responsive design.

GitRubyJavaScriptHTML/CSSjQueryFigma
RIDEmory

A self-updating database of ride information for Emory students accessible via the web or GroupMe. Currently WIP, watch the repository and check back for updates!
